calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(@timestamp=[$0], category=[$1], value=[$2], timestamp=[$3])
    LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>=($0, TIMESTAMP('2022-12-10 13:11:04':VARCHAR)), <=($0, TIMESTAMP('2025-09-03 15:10:00':VARCHAR)))])
      CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_time_data]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..9=[{inputs}], expr#10=[Sarg[['2022-12-10 13:11:04':VARCHAR..'2025-09-03 15:10:00':VARCHAR]]:VARCHAR], expr#11=[SEARCH($t0, $t10)], proj#0..3=[{exprs}], $condition=[$t11])
    CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_time_data]])
